result.text:
After rounds of thoughtful discussions and debates, I think I am domesticated...😂

@MadLads has no utility, no share of profits from @Backpack exchange, directly or indirectly...no airdrop expected, no buyback by the team...The face value could go to zero if you think so...

So why am I holding it? Conviction, I love my pfp, love the pple, love the community!

It is a cult, but an intelligent one.
